Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And For Sanctions;
Off Calendar Dec-21-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Gregory Anderson Thyberg, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Chu Truong
Linda Schaap, Esq., appeared for Defendant & opposing party:

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted as modified: Plaintiff Chu Truong's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents is granted for the period August 2004 through June 2006. Defendant's failure to produce was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to produce responsive documents, redacting the name of the individual technologists, BY JANUARY 10, 2008. SANCTIONS DENIED. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Complt To Add Punitive Damages Per Ccp 425.14
Off Calendar Oct-17-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CHU TRUONG'S Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint To Add Punitive Damages Per CCP 425.14 is denied. Plaintiff's decalaration does not provide clear and convincing evidence that defendant Catholic Healthcare West itself was guilty of malice, fraud or oppression or that it authorized or ratified the wrongful conduct or that it had advanced knowledge of the employees unfitness or employed the employee with conscious disregard of others' rights or safety. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =(301/PJB/X-SN)
